BVRules.GeneralRules1: Bali Vacation is a 3 or more reels, 4-row video slot featuring Infinity Reels and increasing multiplier with no poker symbols.
BVRules.GeneralRules2: The game is played with 10 base bet (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
BVRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination3: On any spin, if the rightmost reel does not improve any winning combination and there is a Free Spins symbol on the rightmost reel, then an extra reel is added to the right.
BVRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination4: The added extra reel is spun, and if it again improves any winning combination, then another extra reel is added and so on.
BVRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination5: Wins are calculated once no extra reel is added.
BVRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination7: A combination win in cash is equal to the value shown in the "Paytable" multiplied by bet size and bet level.
BVRules.GeneralRules3: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.

BVCommonRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination1: At every spin starting with 3 reels, any combinations of 5 or more symbols (excluding Free Spins symbol) from the leftmost reel will result in a winning combination.
BVCommonRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination2: On any spin, if the rightmost reel improves any winning combination, then an extra reel is added to the right.
BVCommonRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination6: For every winning combination, payout is made for each symbol according to the "Paytable".
BVCommonRules.WildsExplaination1: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Free Spins symbol.
BVCommonRules.WildsExplaination2: Wild symbol appears on all reels except reel 1.

BVMultiplier.Title: Multiplier
BVMultiplier.MultiplierExplaination1: At the start of any main game spin, the win multiplier is x1.
BVMultiplier.MultiplierExplaination2: During any main game spin, the win multiplier increases by 1 for every extra reel added.
BVMultiplier.MultiplierExplaination3: Wins are then multiplied by the win multiplier and paid once no extra reel is added.

BVNoPoker.Title: No Poker Feature
BVNoPoker.NoPokerExplaination1: At the start of any main game spin, the No Poker Feature may be randomly triggered and all poker symbols (Ace symbol, King symbol, Queen symbol, Jack symbol and Ten symbol) will be removed from the reels before reels stop spinning.

BVFreeSpinRules.Title: Free Spins Feature
BVFreeSpinRules.FreeSpinExplaination1: 3 Free Spins symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 8 free spins. Each additional Free Spins symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
BVFreeSpinRules.FreeSpinExplaination2: All poker symbols (Ace symbol, King symbol, Queen symbol, Jack symbol and Ten symbol) are removed from the reels before the Free Spins Feature begins.
BVFreeSpinRules.FreeSpinExplaination3: At the start of the Free Spins Feature, the win multiplier is x1.
BVFreeSpinRules.FreeSpinExplaination4: During any free spins, the win multiplier increases by 1 for every extra reel added.
